_README: Submissions the intake notifier should NOT flag (e.g. internal chapter business that doesn't belong on the public calendar). Match by title (case-insensitive substring) in ignoreTitles, or by exact submission _date timestamp in ignoreDates. The two ignoreDates below are the 2026-06-03 platform-test submissions ('Test' and the 'DIAGNOSTIC … (ignore)' diagnostic, both ΧΛΛ); they have no real curated event to match, so they're suppressed by timestamp to keep the daily pre-check from firing on them forever.
